title: PACT Event
description: Every PACT operation produces an event with this structure.

actorKind.description: Type of actor that produced the event.

correlationId.description: Links related events (e.g., create -> approve -> merge).

payloadJson.description: JSON payload with operation-specific data. For `pact.log.root` events, this contains the signed-root descriptor: `{ resource_id, window_start_seq, window_end_seq, window_end_hash, signature, signing_key }` per §6.4.

prev_hash.description: Base64url-encoded SHA-256 of the canonical JSON encoding (RFC 8785) of the immediately preceding event in the same resource's log. The first event uses the literal `"GENESIS"`. Implementations rejecting `prev_hash` mismatches detect silent tampering of past events. REQUIRED at Extended and Authorization-Required conformance levels per §6.4; RECOMMENDED at Core. Events emitted before v2.0.2 may lack this field; the first v2.0.2-emitted event after upgrade SHOULD use `"GENESIS-v202"` to mark the transition.
